title: audit — health probes
description: Health probes covering vendor observer wiring + retention policy cache + purge job liveness + archive bucket reachability + orchestration invariants (immutability enforcement, non-null tenant_id).

probes.name: audit-vendor-observer-bound
probes.description: Verifies the vendor `AuditableObserver` is bound to the Model event dispatcher. Reflection check on `Model::getEventDispatcher()`. Critical — without it, capture is silently broken.

probes.name: audit-observer-registered
probes.description: Verifies our AuditObserver is registered on our Audit model wrapper. Immutability enforcement depends on this observer running on every creating/updating/deleting event.

probes.name: audit-immutability-enforced
probes.description: Attempts to UPDATE a probe audit row (fabricated in a transaction, immediately rolled back). Verifies AuditObserver::updating throws NOTIFICATIONS_AUDIT_ROW_IMMUTABLE. Critical — silent failure of this invariant is a compliance breach.

probes.name: audit-tenant-id-column-present
probes.description: Verifies the audits.tenant_id column exists + is NOT NULL. Fails if the module's migration hasn't run. Critical — everything else depends on this schema shape.

probes.name: audit-application-id-column-present
probes.description: Verifies the audits.application_id column exists (NULLABLE per §tenancy-columns.md §2 — audits is one of 8 named rows that carry application_id but nullable for platform-plane audits).

probes.name: audit-retention-policies-table-present
probes.description: Verifies audit_retention_policies table exists with expected columns. Non-critical — if missing, retention defaults to 7y config value.

probes.name: audit-archive-bucket-reachable
probes.description: HEAD probe of AUDIT_ARCHIVE_S3_BUCKET. Verifies IAM credentials + bucket existence. Non-critical — hot-tier writes continue even if archive is unreachable; ExportAuditsToArchiveJob would fail on its next run.

probes.name: audit-erasure-archive-bucket-reachable
probes.description: HEAD probe of AUDIT_ERASURE_ARCHIVE_S3_BUCKET. Non-critical for steady state, but critical when a TenantErased event fires (PurgeAuditDataForErasedTenantHook would fail).

probes.name: audit-purge-job-liveness
probes.description: Verifies PurgeExpiredAuditsJob ran successfully within the last 25 hours (nightly at 03:00 UTC + 1h buffer). Reads Redis key `audit:purge:last_completed_at`. Non-critical single-run miss; escalates if multiple consecutive missed.

probes.name: audit-fire-rate-anomaly
probes.description: Compares last-hour audit fire rate against the 7-day-rolling baseline per tenant. Warns on >3x spike (potential data-mutation storm — importer, migration, or exfiltration attempt). Non-critical — informational for the on-call dashboard.
